scripts.start:dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend --handle-input "npm run start:backend" "npm run start:frontend"
scripts.start:all: cd backend && docker compose --profile monitoring --profile frontend up -d
scripts.client-codegen: rimraf ./backend-client/**/* --glob && npm run update-openapi-spec && openapi-generator-cli generate -g typescript-fetch -o ./backend-client -p=npmName=@dlr-shepard/backend-client,npmVersion=1.0,supportsES6=true,typescriptThreePlus=true -i ./backend-client/.openapi-source/openapi.json && cd backend-client && npm install
